headings.usage: Dashboard titles, metric numbers, modal headers

primary.name: Macaw Orange
primary.usage: Primary buttons, active states, key chart highlights. Represents the parrot/exotic touch.

visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid #E2E8E0 on all cards, inputs, and tables. Flat and crisp aesthetics.
visual_enhancers.radius: rounded-lg (8px maximum) for cards and buttons. Avoid overly pill-shaped elements for admin dense data.
visual_enhancers.surfaces: Solid flat backgrounds. NO gradients. Use glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-md bg-white/80) ONLY for sticky headers or top nav bars.
visual_enhancers.hover_states: Interactive cards lift slightly (-translate-y-1) with a soft shadow-md. Buttons change color to a darker shade.

grids_and_layouts.dashboard_grid: High Density Grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4 or gap-6. KPIs in col-span-1, Main charts in col-span-2 or col-span-3.
grids_and_layouts.spacing: Generous internal spacing. Use p-6 inside cards. The layout must feature a fixed left sidebar (approx 260px) and 1fr content area.
grids_and_layouts.sidebar: Dark Nordic Pine sidebar. Must remain sticky. Include branding/logo at top, navigation links, and user profile block at bottom.

component_instructions.tables: Use Shadcn Table. Grid borders style (border-collapse, border-b on rows). Add filtering/search at top left. MUST include row actions (View, Edit, Delete).
component_instructions.buttons: Shadcn Button. Use Macaw Orange for primary CTA ONLY. Use outline or ghost for secondary/table actions.
component_instructions.cards: Shadcn Card. Override default shadow to shadow-sm. Use sharp clear borders.
component_instructions.charts: Use Recharts (or Shadcn Chart). Use Macaw Orange and Canopy Green. Add tooltip, subtle grid lines, and responsive container.

motion.hover: Transition transform and colors over 0.2s ease.
motion.stagger: Fade in list items and table rows when feasible, but prioritize immediate data render.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure Macaw Orange text on white meets WCAG AA (use darker #CC4A00 if needed for text). White on Orange is AAA.
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion for all UI animations.

login_background.usage: Use as a full-cover background for the split-screen login page (right side). Apply a bg-black/40 overlay so it's subtle.

bird_avatar_1.usage: Placeholder for registered bird images in the table or drawer.

icons.instruction: Use Duotone weight for dashboard sidebar icons. Use Regular for standard UI elements and table actions.

universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: DO NOT use purple/violet gradients (#7351B7) or generic teal (#1B93A4). Stick to the Nordic Pine + Macaw Orange theme.
Use data-testid attributes on ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, menu items, table rows).
Do not center-align the app container. All text and forms should flow left-aligned for data readability.
Prioritize Recharts or Shadcn Charts for KPI line charts.
Use Sonner for all toast notifications (e.g., success message on block user or delete bird).
Ensure sidebar is responsive: hidden on mobile behind a hamburger menu, 250-300px fixed width on desktop.
Do not use generic 'transition: all' in CSS. Explicitly define transition-colors, transition-transform.
All application text, headers, menus, and labels MUST be in Swedish.
Avoid overly complex 3D libraries unless strictly necessary for a chart; stick to high-performance 2D SVG/Canvas charts for the admin panel.
